headline: Berkshire Hathaway Inc (BRK.B) Says No Railroad Consolidation
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE:BRK.B) is one of the best long-term stocks to invest in according to Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust. The stock is backed by 126 hedge funds. According to a Financial Times report on June 11, Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE:BRK.B) is against the proposed merger of railroad operators Union Pacific and Norfolk […]
